artifact.content_preview:
IT PORTFOLIO — COMBINED PROJECT STATUS UPDATE
Reporting Period: March 2026 (Week 1)
Portfolio Manager: Bob Morrison
Distribution: IT Executive Committee; ADM Digital Services

---

PROJECT 1: NGIS PHASE 3 — DATA CENTRE CONSOLIDATION
Project ID: NGIS-P3-2024-001 | Project Manager: Alice Tran
Status: YELLOW | Budget: $2.4M | Deadline: Q2 2026

Summary: Project has encountered a 2-week vendor delay on critical
network equipment. TechSupplier has confirmed revised delivery of March 20
(was March 6).

extracted_tasks.text: Complete impact assessment on migration timeline
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Impact assessment on migration timeline (Carol Nguyen, due Mar 7)
SA&A documentation update for TBS (Dave Chen, due Mar 12)

extracted_tasks.text: Obtain Director approval of revised budget
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Director approval of revised budget (deadline: Mar 10)

extracted_tasks.text: Procurement strategy kick-off for ASM tooling platform scheduled for March 9
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Procurement strategy kick-off scheduled for March 9

extracted_tasks.text: Address portfolio-level risk of NGIS-to-GC-Cloud dependency chain to prevent cascade delays to GC-Cloud Wave 4 Q3 target
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Delays in NGIS Phase 3 will cascade to GC-Cloud Wave 4, potentially pushing the Q3 target. Portfolio risk level: HIGH.

extracted_tasks.text: Address shared resource constraint risk: Bob Morrison is lead technical resource on both NGIS Phase 3 and GC-Cloud Wave 4; mitigate risk of his potential departure impacting both projects simultaneously
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: His potential departure (flagged in NGIS Sprint Review) would impact both projects simultaneously. Risk level: HIGH.
